systemAnalysis.systemImpact: No impact on the running system. The changes involve adding a new test suite that uses mocking and does not interact with any live services.
externalDependencies: The tests will mock the 'requests' library to avoid making live HTTP calls to a Grafana instance.

executionSteps.description: Create empty test files for each module to establish the test suite structure.
Implement unit tests for DashboardBuilder to validate the JSON structure of dashboards and various panel types.

files.change: Add tests for `create_dashboard` and all `create_*_panel` methods. Verify correct structure, titles, queries, and options application for each panel type (timeseries, stat, gauge, etc.).

executionSteps.description: Implement unit tests for GrafanaClient, mocking all external HTTP requests.

files.change: Add tests for API methods (`get_dashboard`, `create_dashboard`, `update_dashboard`). Mock `requests.Session.request` to test success paths, authentication header injection, and error handling for various HTTP statuses (401, 403, 500) and connection issues.

executionSteps.description: Implement integration tests for the GrafanaSetup orchestrator and main script logic.

files.change: Add tests for the main `setup_dashboard` logic. Mock the `GrafanaClient` to test idempotency (verifying that `update_dashboard` is called if the dashboard exists and `create_dashboard` is called if it doesn't). Test the `--dry-run` functionality by asserting that no API calls are made and JSON is printed. Test command-line argument parsing and error handling.
